message:
chore(beads): close frankentorch-fntr in JSONL (DB sync drift workaround)

The SQLite mirror under .beads/beads.db has a known drift bug
(missing some recent issues including frankentorch-0tw,
frankentorch-6q4m, frankentorch-fntr) so br update couldn't close
fntr through the normal path. JSONL is the source of truth — the
softmax/log_softmax subprocess conformance landed in 155daa1
covers the test gap that fntr tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
